case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. ALLEGHENY CASUALTY COMPANY

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEGHENY CASUALTY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALLEGHENY CASUALTY COMPANY $25,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $300.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $25,300.50, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER TO WAIVE THE FILING FEES FOR A STIPULATION TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT
STIPULATION AND ORDER TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND EXONERATE BOND FILED BY THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA ALLEGHENY CASUALTY COMPANY
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER FILED BY PLTF PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA.
